title: Physics: Mechanics
catalogDescription: Explores principles of mechanics: motion, momentum, work and energy, Newton's laws, rotation, and gravity. Includes analyses using calculus and lab activities. Prerequisite: a minimum grade of 2.0 in either TMATH 122, TMATH 124, or MATH 124.

title: Physics: Electromagnetism
catalogDescription: Explores principles of electromagnetism: charge, electric force and fields, flux and potential, circuits, magnetic force and fields, and Maxwell's equations. Includes analyses using calculus and lab activities. Prerequisite: a minimum grade of 2.0 in T PHYS 121; and a minimum grade of 2.0 in either TMATH 125 or MATH 125.

title: Physics: Waves, Light, Heat
catalogDescription: Explores principles of oscillatory motion, electromagnetic waves, optics, waves in matter, fluids, and thermodynamics. Includes analyses using calculus and lab activities. Prerequisite: a minimum grade of 2.0 in T PHYS 122; and a minimum grade of 2.0 in either TMATH 125 or MATH 125.
